dict list.description: List pronunciation dictionaries (IPA / alias lexicons). Filters: --cursor, --page-size, --search.

dict add-file <name> <file>.description: Upload a PLS XML / lexicon file as a new pronunciation dictionary. Multipart POST /v1/pronunciation-dictionaries/add-from-file.

dict add-rules <name>.description: Create a dictionary in-line from --rule WORD:PHONEME (IPA) and/or --alias-rule WORD:ALIAS flags (both repeatable). First ':' splits word from phoneme so IPA tone/length colons survive.

dict show <id>.description: Show full metadata for a pronunciation dictionary.

dict update <id>.description: Update dictionary metadata or archive it. PATCH /v1/pronunciation-dictionaries/{id}. Archiving is reversible server-side so no --yes is required.

dict download <id>.description: Download the rendered PLS XML for a dictionary version. Defaults to the latest version.

dict set-rules <id>.description: Replace every rule in the dictionary with the given set (creates a new version).

dict add-rules-to <id>.description: Append one or more rules to an existing dictionary (creates a new version).
